description_blurb: The FBI's 62-HQ-83894 case file includes investigative records, eyewitness testimonies, and public reports concerning Unidentified Flying Objects and flying discs documented between June 1947 and July 1968. The records include high-profile incident accounts, photographic evidence from sites like Oak Ridge, TN, and technical proposals regarding potential propulsion systems. Additional topics include convention programs, researcher accounts, and extensive media coverage from the period.  This file is partially posted on FBI vault with more redactions and some pages missing.  Included here is the complete case file with several newly declassified pages and only minor redactions.
title: 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153
summary: This FBI document, Serial 153 of case file 62-HQ-83894, details "flying saucers" observed over Oak Ridge, Tennessee, in July 1947. It includes two photographs of the reputedly "flying saucers" and a Knoxville News-Sentinel newspaper clipping from July 1947, featuring a photograph taken by W. R. Presley showing a blurry, bright, circular object in the sky. The sighting generated local discussion and media coverage.
reported_object_description: flying saucers, blurry object in the sky, bright, circular object
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the evidence consists solely of single, low-quality, blurry photographs with no accompanying kinematic data or corroborating multi-sensor observations. The newspaper article itself uses speculative language and does not provide any investigative findings. The visual characteristics of the 'object' are highly consistent with common photographic artifacts or misidentification of a mundane object.
full_text:
# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 1

62-HQ-83894 VOL 1 SERIAL 153 ONLY

***

FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER

HQ - HEADQUARTERS

| Class / Case # | Sub | Vol. | Serial # |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 0062 83894 | | 1 | 153 ONLY |

8/11/1274168
[Barcode]
RRP003IXGA

***

Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 2

KNOXVILLE FILE #65-11

RE: "FLYING SAUCERS" OBSERVED OVER OAK RIDGE AREA
INTERNAL SECURITY - X

ENCLOSURES TO BUREAU:

Two photographs of reputedly "flying saucers"
seen at Oak Ridge, Tennessee, during July 1947.

Photostatic copy of newspaper clipping appearing
in the Knoxville News-Sentinel concerning these
"flying saucers."



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 3

This page is a mostly blank brown document cover containing the following markings at the bottom center:

62-83894-153
ENCLOSURE



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 4

KNOXVILLE NEWS-SENTINEL
JULY 1947

'FLYING SAUCER' PHOTOGRAPHED AT OAK RIDGE

W. R. PRESLEY had snapped several pictures of his family and his house at 218 Illinois Avenue, Oak Ridge, the other afternoon and, noticing he had one film 'left on the roll, he turned and snapped it for a picture of the mountain.

[Image: A photograph showing a landscape with a blurry object in the sky]

He had the roll developed, and look what he got on that last shot! Now don't start trying to explain it off. Just go ahead and say what it looks like. Sure. Sure. You're right. It is a Flying Saucer. A lot of folks have reported seeing the things. This, however, is the first time that one has ever been photographed over Oak Ridge.

Mr. Presley says this picture has all of Oak Ridge talking.



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 5

Page 5 of 9

[The page is mostly blank, containing only the following handwritten text at the bottom:]

62-83894-153



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 6

This page contains only a photograph.



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 7

This page is blank, except for the following handwritten notation at the bottom right:

62-83844-153



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 8

This page contains a black and white photograph of a residential area with houses, a utility pole, and a bright, circular object in the sky.

There is a handwritten "2" in the top left corner.



# 65_HS1-834228961_62-HQ-83894_Serial_153 - Page 9

This page is mostly blank.

[Handwritten at bottom right]: 62-83894-153
cover_up_reasoning: No concealment is evident in this document. It is a straightforward FBI record enclosing a newspaper clipping and photographs related to a public report. There are no redactions, no references to classified follow-ups or annexes, and no language suggesting suppression or witness intimidation. The declassification authority is clearly stated.
summary_zh: 此份联邦调查局文件，案件档案62-HQ-83894的第153号文件，详细记录了1947年7月在田纳西州橡树岭上空观测到的“飞碟”事件。其中包含两张据称是“飞碟”的照片，以及一份1947年7月的《诺克斯维尔新闻哨兵报》剪报，该剪报刊登了W. R. Presley拍摄的一张照片，显示天空中有一个模糊、明亮、圆形的物体。此次目击事件引发了当地讨论和媒体报道。
reported_object_description_zh: 飞碟，天空中模糊的物体，明亮、圆形的物体
reported_behavior_zh: 在橡树岭地区上空被观测到
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥度较高，因为证据仅限于单张、低质量、模糊的照片，且无伴随的运动学数据或多传感器交叉验证观测结果。报纸文章本身使用了推测性语言，且未提供任何调查结果。该“物体”的视觉特征与常见的摄影伪影或对普通物体的误识别高度一致。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 此份文件中未见任何掩盖迹象。这是一份直接的联邦调查局记录，附有与公开报告相关的报纸剪报和照片。无任何删节，无任何提及机密后续行动或附件之处，亦无任何暗示压制或恐吓证人的措辞。解密权限已明确说明。
claims: "Flying saucers" were observed over Oak Ridge, Tennessee, in July 1947.
Photographic evidence of a "flying saucer" exists, taken by W. R. Presley.
The incident received media coverage and caused local discussion.
claims_zh: 1947年7月，在田纳西州橡树岭上空观测到“飞碟”。
存在W. R. Presley拍摄的“飞碟”照片证据。
该事件获得了媒体报道并引发了当地讨论。
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The blurry, bright, and circular nature of the object in both photographs is highly consistent with lens flare, internal reflections within the camera, or other photographic aberrations common with older camera technology, especially given the lack of clear detail.

Out-of-focus conventional object: A distant, ordinary object such as an aircraft, balloon, or even a bird, if photographed out of focus, could easily appear as a blurry, circular shape in the sky, particularly when captured with a single, low-quality image.

Reflected light from an unknown source: The bright, circular appearance could be a reflection of sunlight off a distant object or atmospheric phenomenon, captured in a way that distorts its true form and makes it appear anomalous.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头眩光或相机伪影：两张照片中物体模糊、明亮和圆形的特性与镜头眩光、相机内部反射或其他在老式相机技术中常见的摄影像差高度一致，尤其考虑到缺乏清晰细节。
失焦的常规物体：一个遥远的普通物体，例如飞机、气球，甚至是鸟类，如果拍摄时失焦，很容易在天空中呈现出模糊的圆形，尤其是在仅有一张低质量图像的情况下。
未知来源的反射光：明亮的圆形外观可能是阳光从远处物体或大气现象反射所致，以一种扭曲其真实形态并使其显得异常的方式被捕捉。
